items.title: Five young people die in Spain apartment block fire
items.description: Firefighters say they do not know why the victims could not escape the blaze in the building's upper floor.

items.title: The Martin Luther King protege who helped reshape America
items.description: The US civil rights activist's influence spread from the churches of the Deep South to the White House.

items.title: New nuclear talks between US and Iran begin in Geneva
items.description: The US president says he thinks Iran wants to make a deal, while Tehran believes Washington is moving to a more realistic position.

items.title: Ex-winger Utai in serious condition after shooting
items.description: Former NRL star Matt Utai is in a "critical condition" after being shot multiple times outside his home in Sydney, Australia.

items.title: Lunar New Year 2026: Celebrations around the world
items.description: Millions of people around the world are celebrating the start of the Lunar New Year, with festivities taking place from Hong Kong to Buenos Aires.
